task_updates.executor_notes:
Repo audit completed and re-verified. `system_logs` in `supabase/migrations/20251210000000_create_system_logs.sql:5-18` has columns `id`, `timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now()`, `level NOT NULL`, `logger_name NOT NULL`, `message NOT NULL`, nullable `module`, `function_name`, `line_number`, `exception`, `extra JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb`, nullable `hostname`, and nullable `created_at DEFAULT now()`. No extra NOT NULL columns beyond `timestamp`, `level`, `logger_name`, and `message`. No checked-in migration defines `media.classification`. The only repo hit is an insert using `classification = 'submission'` in `supabase/migrations/20260324100000_redesign_for_elegance.sql:168-186`, so T2 cannot rely on a checked-in enum/CHECK for that column. The latest actual categorical constraint on `public.media` is `source` from `supabase/migrations/20260420220000_extend_posts_for_authoring.sql:21-38`, with `CHECK (source IN ('art', 'post'))` and default `'art'`. Current manual uploads use `source='post'` in `banodoco-website/src/lib/posts.ts:352-363` and `source='art'` in `banodoco-website/src/pages/SubmitArt/index.tsx:78-91`. `cloudflare-stream-webhook` looks up rows by `media.cloudflare_stream_uid` and only writes `cloudflare_playback_hls_url`, `cloudflare_thumbnail_url`, and `storage_provider='cloudflare'` (`supabase/functions/cloudflare-stream-webhook/index.ts:210-219`). `cloudflare-stream-backfill` uses Bearer token == `SB_SECRET_KEY`, creates a service-role client, queries `media` rows with `cloudflare_playback_hls_url IS NULL` and `url IS NOT NULL`, checks existing `cloudflare_stream_uid` status when present, otherwise creates a signed Storage URL from `metadata.bucket/path`, POSTs to Cloudflare Stream `/stream/copy` with `{ url, meta: { name, media_id } }`, then stores the returned UID in `cloudflare_stream_uid` (`supabase/functions/cloudflare-stream-backfill/index.ts:35-58,74-86,108-139,164-219`). This is signed-URL copy ingestion, not tus upload. `discord_messages`, `discord_members`, and `discord_channels` are created without FKs in `supabase/migrations/20251101000000_create_discord_tables.sql:8-85`; later `discord_members` is renamed to `members` in `supabase/migrations/20260323200000_rename_discord_members_to_members.sql:11-22`, so new comment-author FKs should target `public.members(member_id)`. Reaction sync comes from `supabase/migrations/20260319100000_fix_sync_reactors_trigger.sql:1-26`: `sync_message_reactors()` aggregates distinct `discord_reactions.user_id` where `removed_at IS NULL`, then updates `discord_messages.reactors` JSONB and `reaction_count`. `guild_id` additions are nullable in `supabase/migrations/20260320000000_multi_server.sql:101-145`: `discord_messages.guild_id`, `discord_channels.guild_id`, `discord_reactions.guild_id`, and `discord_reaction_log.guild_id`, with indexes `idx_messages_guild_id`, `idx_channels_guild_id`, `idx_reactions_guild_id`, and `idx_reaction_log_guild_id`. pg_cron pattern in `supabase/migrations/20260403000005_schedule_priority_scores_cron.sql:4-23`: wrap in `DO $$`, guard on `pg_available_extensions`, `CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_cron`, and only schedule when absent from `cron.job`. Resource type enum is `lora | workflow` in `banodoco-website/src/pages/SubmitResource/index.tsx:10-13`. `ResourceDetail` currently gets `resource/galleryMedia/loading/error` from `useCommunityResource`, derives `displayMedia = activeMedia ?? galleryMedia[0]`, renders description as plain text inside `
{resource.description}
` (`banodoco-website/src/pages/ResourceDetail/index.tsx:59-74,166-169`), and renders gallery thumbnails from `galleryMedia` with `cloudflare_thumbnail_url` fallback labels (`:228-245`). `ResourceModal` also still renders plain text via `

{asset.description}

` in `banodoco-website/src/pages/Resources/ResourceModal.tsx:185-189`. The real markdown pipeline is `MarkdownRenderer` with `` plus custom component mappings and no rehype/sanitize layer (`banodoco-website/src/components/posts/MarkdownRenderer.tsx:122-126`). `PostBodyRenderer` delegates text segments through `MarkdownTextSegment` / `MarkdownRenderer` (`banodoco-website/src/components/posts/PostBodyRenderer.tsx:42-50`). The staging null-`guild_id` check was attempted first via `psql`, which failed because `db.ujlwuvkrxlvoswwkerdf.supabase.co` did not resolve from this environment. I then re-ran the same check through Supabase REST with the service key and got `content-range: */0`, so the count is 0 for the five target resource channels. T2 therefore does not need the nullable contingency and can keep `asset_comments.discord_guild_id` NOT NULL per plan.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Captured the exact `system_logs` column list and confirmed only `timestamp`, `level`, `logger_name`, and `message` are additionally NOT NULL. Confirmed the webhook lookup column is `media.cloudflare_stream_uid`. No checked-in migration defines `media.classification`; the current repo-enforced categorical constraint on `public.media` is `source IN ('art','post')`, with manual uploads using `source='post'` for post media. The null-`guild_id` check against the five target channels succeeded via Supabase REST and returned count 0, so no contingency flip is required and T2 can keep `asset_comments.discord_guild_id` NOT NULL.
